outputs.main.sas:
# Load required libraries
library(admiral)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(haven)
library(xportr)

# Read SDTM source datasets
adsl <- read_xpt("adsl.xpt")
lb <- read_xpt("lb.xpt")
vs <- read_xpt("vs.xpt")  # Not used but kept for consistency

# Merge LB with ADSL
adsl_vars <- vars(USUBJID, TRT01P, TRT01PN, TRTSDT, TRTEDT, TRT01A, TRT01AN, 
                  AGE, AGEGR1, AGEGR1N, SEX, RACE, ETHNIC, SAFFL, ITTFL, 
                  EFFFL, COMPLFL, DISCONFL, SITEID, SITEGR1, REGION1, 
                  REGION2, STRATAn, STRATAn1, STRATAn2, STRATAn3, STRATAn4)

adlbc <- lb %>%
  left_join(adsl, by = "USUBJID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(LBSTRESC) & !is.na(LBSTRESN)) %>%
  mutate(
    # Derive PARAMCD and PARAM
    PARAMCD = LBTESTCD,
    PARAM = LBTEST,
    PARAMN = as.numeric(factor(PARAMCD, levels = unique(PARAMCD))),
    
    # Derive AVAL and AVALC
    AVAL = LBSTRESN,
    AVALC = LBSTRESC,
    
    # Derive ADT and ADY
    ADT = LBDTC,
    ADY = as.numeric(difftime(LBDTC, TRTSDT, units = "days")),
    
    # Derive ABLFL (baseline flag)
    ABLFL = if_else(LBBLFL == "Y", "Y", NA_character_),
    
    # Derive BASE and BASEC
    BASE = if_else(ABLFL == "Y", AVAL, NA_real_),
    BASEC = if_else(ABLFL == "Y", AVALC, NA_character_),
    
    # Derive ANRIND (analysis reference range indicator)
    ANRIND = case_when(
      AVAL < LBSTNRLO ~ "L",
      AVAL > LBSTNRHI ~ "H",
      AVAL >= LBSTNRLO & AVAL <= LBSTNRHI ~ "N",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # Derive BNRIND (baseline reference range indicator)
    BNRIND = case_when(
      BASE < LBSTNRLO ~ "L",
      BASE > LBSTNRHI ~ "H",
      BASE >= LBSTNRLO & BASE <= LBSTNRHI ~ "N",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # Derive SHIFT variable
    SHIFT = if_else(!is.na(BNRIND) & !is.na(ANRIND), 
                    paste0(BNRIND, " to ", ANRIND), 
                    NA_character_),
    
    # Derive SHIFT1 (numeric version for sorting)
    SHIFT1N = case_when(
      SHIFT == "L to L" ~ 1,
      SHIFT == "L to N" ~ 2,
      SHIFT == "L to H" ~ 3,
      SHIFT == "N to L" ~ 4,
      SHIFT == "N to N" ~ 5,
      SHIFT == "N to H" ~ 6,
      SHIFT == "H to L" ~ 7,
      SHIFT == "H to N" ~ 8,
      SHIFT == "H to H" ~ 9,
      TRUE ~ 99
    ),
    
    # Derive ANL01FL (analysis flag for shift)
    ANL01FL = if_else(!is.na(ABLFL) | (ADY >= 1 & !is.na(AVAL)), "Y", NA_character_),
    
    # Derive DTYPE (no imputation in this example)
    DTYPE = NA_character_,
    
    # Derive CHG (change from baseline)
    CHG = if_else(!is.na(BASE), AVAL - BASE, NA_real_),
    
    # Derive PCHG (percent change from baseline)
    PCHG = if_else(!is.na(BASE) & BASE != 0, (AVAL - BASE) / BASE * 100, NA_real_),
    
    # Derive TRTP (planned treatment)
    TRTP = TRT01P,
    TRTPN = TRT01PN,
    
    # Derive TRTA (actual treatment)
    TRTA = TRT01A,
    TRTAN = TRT01AN,
    
    # Derive VISIT and VISITNUM
    VISIT = VISIT,
    VISITNUM = VISITNUM,
    
    # Derive ADT as date
    ADT = as.Date(ADT),
    
    # Derive ADY (study day)
    ADY = as.numeric(difftime(ADT, TRTSDT, units = "days")),
    
    # Derive ATPT (analysis time point)
    ATPT = NA_character_,
    ATPTN = NA_real_,
    
    # Derive AVALCAT1 (analysis value category)
    AVALCAT1 = case_when(
      AVAL < LBSTNRLO ~ "Low",
      AVAL > LBSTNRHI ~ "High",
      AVAL >= LBSTNRLO & AVAL <= LBSTNRHI ~ "Normal",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # Derive BASECAT1 (baseline category)
    BASECAT1 = case_when(
      BASE < LBSTNRLO ~ "Low",
      BASE > LBSTNRHI ~ "High",
      BASE >= LBSTNRLO & BASE <= LBSTNRHI ~ "Normal",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  # Select ADLBC variables
  select(
    STUDYID, USUBJID, SUBJID, SITEID, SITEGR1, REGION1, REGION2,
    TRTSDT, TRTEDT, TRT01P, TRT01PN, TRT01A, TRT01AN,
    AGE, AGEGR1, AGEGR1N, SEX, RACE, ETHNIC,
    SAFFL, ITTFL, EFFFL, COMPLFL, DISCONFL,
    STRATAn, STRATAn1, STRATAn2, STRATAn3, STRATAn4,
    PARAMCD, PARAM, PARAMN,
    ADT, ADY, AVAL, AVALC, AVALCAT1,
    BASE, BASEC, BASECAT1,
    CHG, PCHG,
    ABLFL, ANL01FL,
    BNRIND, ANRIND, SHIFT, SHIFT1N,
    VISIT, VISITNUM,
    ATPT, ATPTN,
    DTYPE,
    LBSTNRLO, LBSTNRHI, LBSTNRU,
    LBCAT, LBSCAT, LBTEST, LBTESTCD,
    LBDTC, LBBLFL, LBSTRESC, LBSTRESN,
    LBSTRESU, LBORRES, LBORRESU,
    LBMETHOD, LBREASND, LBNAM, LBSPEC,
    LBDOS, LBDOSU, LBEXDAT, LBEXDATU,
    LBTOX, LBTOXGR, LBTOXN, LBTOXNGR
  ) %>%
  # Sort by USUBJID, PARAMCD, ADT
  arrange(USUBJID, PARAMCD, ADT)

# Apply variable labels
attr(adlbc$STUDYID, "label") <- "Study Identifier"
attr(adlbc$USUBJID, "label") <- "Unique Subject Identifier"
attr(adlbc$SUBJID, "label") <- "Subject Identifier for the Study"
attr(adlbc$SITEID, "label") <- "Study Site Identifier"
attr(adlbc$SITEGR1, "label") <- "Site Group 1"
attr(adlbc$REGION1, "label") <- "Region 1"
attr(adlbc$REGION2, "label") <- "Region 2"
attr(adlbc$TRTSDT, "label") <- "Date of First Exposure to Treatment"
attr(adlbc$TRTEDT, "label") <- "Date of Last Exposure to Treatment"
attr(adlbc$TRT01P, "label") <- "Planned Treatment for Period 1"
attr(adlbc$TRT01PN, "label") <- "Planned Treatment for Period 1 (N)"
attr(adlbc$TRT01A, "label") <- "Actual Treatment for Period 1"
attr(adlbc$TRT01AN, "label") <- "Actual Treatment for Period 1 (N)"
attr(adlbc$AGE, "label") <- "Age"
attr(adlbc$AGEGR1, "label") <- "Age Group 1"
attr(adlbc$AGEGR1N, "label") <- "Age Group 1 (N)"
attr(adlbc$SEX, "label") <- "Sex"
attr(adlbc$RACE, "label") <- "Race"
attr(adlbc$ETHNIC, "label") <- "Ethnicity"
attr(adlbc$SAFFL, "label") <- "Safety Population Flag"
attr(adlbc$ITTFL, "label") <- "Intent-to-Treat Population Flag"
attr(adlbc$EFFFL, "label") <- "Efficacy Population Flag"
attr(adlbc$COMPLFL, "label") <- "Completers Population Flag"
attr(adlbc$DISCONFL, "label") <- "Discontinued from Study Flag"
attr(adlbc$STRATAn, "label") <- "Stratification Factor n"
attr(adlbc$STRATAn1, "label") <- "Stratification Factor n1"
attr(adlbc$STRATAn2, "label") <- "Stratification Factor n2"
attr(adlbc$STRATAn3, "label") <- "Stratification Factor n3"
attr(adlbc$STRATAn4, "label") <- "Stratification Factor n4"
attr(adlbc$PARAMCD, "label") <- "Parameter Code"
attr(adlbc$PARAM, "label") <- "Parameter"
attr(adlbc$PARAMN, "label") <- "Parameter (N)"
attr(adlbc$ADT, "label") <- "Analysis Date"
attr(adlbc$ADY, "label") <- "Analysis Relative Day"
attr(adlbc$AVAL, "label") <- "Analysis Value"
attr(adlbc$AVALC, "label") <- "Analysis Value (C)"
attr(adlbc$AVALCAT1, "label") <- "Analysis Value Category 1"
attr(adlbc$BASE, "label") <- "Baseline Value"
attr(adlbc$BASEC, "label") <- "Baseline Value (C)"
attr(adlbc$BASECAT1, "label") <- "Baseline Category 1"
attr(adlbc$CHG, "label") <- "Change from Baseline"
attr(adlbc$PCHG, "label") <- "Percent Change from Baseline"
attr(adlbc$ABLFL, "label") <- "Baseline Record Flag"
attr(adlbc$ANL01FL, "label") <- "Analysis Flag 01"
attr(adlbc$BNRIND, "label") <- "Baseline Reference Range Indicator"
attr(adlbc$ANRIND, "label") <- "Analysis Reference Range Indicator"
attr(adlbc$SHIFT, "label") <- "Shift from Baseline to Post-Baseline"
attr(adlbc$SHIFT1N, "label") <- "Shift Numeric Code"
attr(adlbc$VISIT, "label") <- "Visit Name"
attr(adlbc$VISITNUM, "label") <- "Visit Number"
attr(adlbc$ATPT, "label") <- "Analysis Time Point"
attr(adlbc$ATPTN, "label") <- "Analysis Time Point (N)"
attr(adlbc$DTYPE, "label") <- "Derivation Type"
attr(adlbc$LBSTNRLO, "label") <- "Reference Range Lower Limit"
attr(adlbc$LBSTNRHI, "label") <- "Reference Range Upper Limit"
attr(adlbc$LBSTNRU, "label") <- "Reference Range Unit"
attr(adlbc$LBCAT, "label") <- "Lab Category"
attr(adlbc$LBSCAT, "label") <- "Lab Subcategory"
attr(adlbc$LBTEST, "label") <- "Lab Test Name"
attr(adlbc$LBTESTCD, "label") <- "Lab Test Short Name"
attr(adlbc$LBDTC, "label") <- "Date/Time of Specimen Collection"
attr(adlbc$LBBLFL, "label") <- "Baseline Flag"
attr(adlbc$LBSTRESC, "label") <- "Character Result/Finding in Std Format"
attr(adlbc$LBSTRESN, "label") <- "Numeric Result/Finding in Std Format"
attr(adlbc$LBSTRESU, "label") <- "Standard Units"
attr(adlbc$LBORRES, "label") <- "Original Result"
attr(adlbc$LBORRESU, "label") <- "Original Units"
attr(adlbc$LBMETHOD, "label") <- "Method of Test"
attr(adlbc$LBREASND, "label") <- "Reason Not Done"
attr(adlbc$LBNAM, "label") <- "Vendor Name"
attr(adlbc$LBSPEC, "label") <- "Specimen Type"
attr(adlbc$LBDOS, "label") <- "Dosage"
attr(adlbc$LBDOSU, "label") <- "Dosage Unit"
attr(adlbc$LBEXDAT, "label") <- "Exposure Date"
attr(adlbc$LBEXDATU, "label") <- "Exposure Date Unit"
attr(adlbc$LBTOX, "label") <- "Toxicity"
attr(adlbc$LBTOXGR, "label") <- "Toxicity Grade"
attr(adlbc$LBTOXN, "label") <- "Toxicity (N)"
attr(adlbc$LBTOXNGR, "label") <- "Toxicity Grade (N)"

# Write to XPT
adlbc %>%
  xportr_write(path = "adlbc.xpt", label = "Laboratory Analysis Dataset (Shift Analysis)")
